closed_world.value: Supernatural train with force-field that traps occupants permanently in carriages
closed_world.quote: The force-field wrapped around it would keep them inside, keep them prisoner.

investigator.value: Neil Parker, network administrator who discovers the hidden train while revisiting childhood fears
investigator.quote: Neil walked across and shone the torch inside. The light caught something metallic

red_herring.value: The marital discord and divorce thoughts presented as Neil's primary concern, distracting from the supernatural trap
red_herring.quote: The word 'divorce' was becoming more and more frequent in his mind, as though pervading his consciousness

clue_fairness.value: The boarded alcove with one entrance 'split and splintered' is shown before Neil discovers the trapped locomotive
clue_fairness.quote: regularly spaced alcoves, each one boarded up, except one further along, its board split and splintered

social_world.value: Workplace hierarchy at hospital demanding Neil complete firewall monitoring of employee internet access
social_world.quote: They had been asking him to basically get a move on, as they were impatient to monitor their employee's

reveal_mechanic.value: The supernatural force-field trap explained through Neil's realization that occupants cannot leave and cannot age
reveal_mechanic.quote: The force-field wrapped around it would keep them inside, keep them prisoner

investigator_wound.value: Neil's childhood fear of the tunnel, returning as an adult to face the same terror that paralyzed him at age eight
investigator_wound.quote: The surge of fear came back to him, and he was glad nobody could see his reddening face
